name: Inflation Calculator
desc: Inflation Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
description: Inflation Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_description: Calculate valor_futuro, poder_adquisitivo with our free inflation calculator. Just enter valor_actual, tasa_inflacion, anos and get results instantly.
example_label: Calculating how €1,000 today will be affected by 2.8% annual inflation over 15 years.
result_context: The valor_futuro of {valor_futuro} shows nominal future value. The poder_adquisitivo of {poder_adquisitivo} shows real purchasing power in today's eur.
mistakes: Assuming inflation remains constant over long periods
Confusing nominal returns with real (inflation-adjusted) returns
Not accounting for inflation when planning retirement needs
